events.reasoning: Proceeding
Starting WATCHER A0
Talking to Neow to see blessing options for starting the run

events.translated: [ Lose your starting Relic Obtain a random boss Re
events.reasoning: Boss relic swap has the highest ceiling. Losing Pure Water (Miracle) is acceptable. We need a powerful relic to carry this run to a win.
Transforming 3 Strikes via Astrolabe into upgraded random Watcher cards. Strikes are the weakest cards in our deck.
Selecting Strike 1 of 3 to transform via Astrolabe
Selecting Strike 2 of 3 to transform via Astrolabe
Selecting Strike 3 of 3 to transform via Astrolabe
Confirming Astrolabe selections - transforming 3 Strikes
Selecting 3 Strikes to transform via Astrolabe
Selecting first Strike to transform
Leaving Neow event to start the run

Run 27 begins! Astrolabe gave us Pray+, Tranquility+, and Like Water+. Tranquility+ is a free Wrath exit which is great for stance dancing. Like Water+ gives passive block in Calm. Route plan: take fights to build deck, hit rest at F6, aim for 1 elite if we are strong enough. Boss is Hexaghost - need to handle its multi-attack.

events.label: Run Start
events.reasoning: Run 27 begins! Astrolabe gave us Pray+, Tranquility+, and Like Water+. Tranquility+ is a free Wrath exit which is great for stance dancing. Like Water+ gives passive block in Calm. Route plan: take fights to build deck, hit rest at F6, aim for 1 elite if we are strong enough. Boss is Hexaghost - need to handle its multi-attack.
Taking Monster at x=4 for more branching options. This leads to Unknown or Monster on F2, then we can path toward rest at F6.
No attacks in hand. Vigilance gives 8 block and enters Calm. Pray+ gives 3 Mantra toward Divinity. Block covers Louse 0 attack of 7. Next turn we should draw Eruption and Strike for damage.
Draw card(s) to see if we get more options before committing to attack line

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Tranquility+; play Like Water+; play Defend; end
events.translated: Eruption → Louse → Strike → Louse → Tranquility+ → Like Water+ → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Louse 0 with Eruption+Strike in Wrath (10+9=19 damage vs 16 HP). Exit Wrath via Tranquility+. Play Like Water+ for sustained block generation. Defend for immediate block. Total block: 5+6=11 vs 7 incoming.

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Vigilance; play Pray+; end
events.translated: Eruption → Louse → Vigilance → Pray+ → End Turn
events.reasoning: Eruption kills Louse 0 (13 damage vs 4 HP). Vigilance exits Wrath to Calm (8 block). Pray+ brings Mantra to 7/10 toward Divinity. Like Water+ gives 7 block at end of turn. Total 15 block vs 7 incoming.
Draw 2 cards to find Pray+ for Divinity entry or Eruption for damage. No incoming damage this turn so free to setup.

Playing Strike to trigger Curl Up 7 on a free turn (enemy is debuffing, no damage incoming). This removes the block buffer so next turn Eruption hits for full damage. Like Water+ will give 7 block end of turn in Calm.
Pray+ gives 3 Mantra (8+3=11), triggering Divinity stance! In Divinity: triple damage + 3 bonus energy. Eruption deals 9*3*0.75=20 damage (Weakened) vs 8 HP Louse = kill. Clean fight at full HP!
Checking card reward options

Fear No Evil is both damage and a conditional Wrath exit (enters Calm when enemy intends to attack). With Tranquility+ exhausted, we need more stance exits. This card is perfect for our stance-dancing strategy.
Moving to map to choose next path
Taking Unknown at x=3. This path leads through unknowns and a monster to Rest at F6. Unknowns can give free relics, gold, or card removals. At full HP we can handle any event outcome.
At full HP, trading 11 HP for 75 gold is excellent value. 61 HP remaining is still very healthy. Gold enables shop purchases for key cards/relics.
Leaving the event with 186 gold and 61 HP
Only path available. Continuing through Unknown at x=3.
Continuing to see the card removal options. Bonfire Spirits is great for deck thinning.

events.translated: [Offer] Receive a reward based on the offer.
events.reasoning: Offering a card to the bonfire spirits for a reward. Will remove our worst card.
Removing Strike - weakest card in deck. No synergy with stance dancing. Deck goes to 10 cards, improving draw quality significantly.
Confirming Strike removal from Bonfire Spirits
Leaving Bonfire Spirits. Deck is now 10 cards with no Strikes - much cleaner draws.
Only path. Monster fight at F4, then Unknown at F5, then Rest at F6. Need fights for card rewards and deck building.

events.command: play Like Water+; play Eruption 0; end
events.translated: Like Water+ → Eruption → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free damage turn - Cultist is incanting (no damage). Like Water+ for long-term block in Calm. Eruption deals 18 damage in Wrath. Safe to end in Wrath since 0 incoming. Next turn Fear No Evil from draw pile will exit Wrath to Calm.
Fear No Evil deals damage (doubled if in Wrath) then enters Calm since enemy is attacking. This exits Wrath safely. Then block up for the 12 incoming damage.
Defend (5 block) + Like Water+ (7 block end of turn) = 12 block vs 6 incoming. Safe. Pray+ adds 3 Mantra toward Divinity for a future burst turn. Cultist at 26 HP, we kill next turn.
Draw 2 cards from draw pile (Eruption, Fear No Evil, 2x Defend). Need attacks to kill Cultist before Ritual stacks too high.

events.command: play Pray+; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: No attacks in hand. Block up with 2x Defend (10 block) + Like Water (7 block) = 17 vs 9 incoming. Pray+ adds 3 Mantra (7/10 toward Divinity). Next turn should draw Eruption + Fear No Evil for the kill.
Eruption from Calm: leave Calm (+2E), enter Wrath, deal damage. Testing if damage is doubled in Wrath. If 18 damage, Cultist goes to 8 HP. Then Fear No Evil in Wrath finishes it.
Fear No Evil in Wrath deals doubled damage (14+) and exits to Calm since enemy is attacking. Then block up for remaining damage.
Block 10 + Like Water 7 = 17 block vs 12 incoming. Cultist at 1 HP dies next turn to any attack. No attacks in hand this turn.
Drawing 2 cards to find Eruption or Fear No Evil to kill the 1 HP Cultist
Eruption kills the 1 HP Cultist. Overkill but only attack in hand.
Checking card reward options

Wallop is perfect - deals 9 damage (18 in Wrath) and gains block equal to unblocked damage dealt. We desperately need more attacks in our skill-heavy deck. Wallop in Wrath is both offense and defense in one card.
Moving to map
Only path. Unknown at F5, then Rest at F6 for upgrade or heal.

events.translated: Eruption → Acid Slime (S) → Pray+ → End Turn
events.reasoning: Eruption kills Acid Slime S (9 damage vs 9 HP). Enter Wrath. Pray+ adds 3 Mantra toward Divinity. Both enemies buffing so safe to end in Wrath. Next turn burst down Spike Slime M.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 1; play Tranquility+; play Defend; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Spike Slime (M) → Tranquility+ → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Fear No Evil deals 16 damage in Wrath (Slime at 13 HP). Tranquility+ exits Wrath to Calm. Defend for minor safety. Slime is debuffing (0 damage, adds Slimed). Exhausting Tranquility+ is OK since we have Vigilance and Fear No Evil for future Wrath exits.
Draw 2 from draw pile to possibly find another attack. Need to deal 13+ damage to kill Spike Slime this turn. Wallop alone does 9.

events.translated: Wallop → Spike Slime (M) → Slimed → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wallop deals 9 damage (Slime at 4 HP). Exhaust Slimed to clean deck. Enemy debuffing so no damage incoming. Kill next turn.

events.translated: Fear No Evil → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Fear No Evil does 8 damage vs 4 HP Spike Slime = kill. Also enters Calm since enemy was attacking. Clean finish.
Taking Block Potion for emergency defense
Checking card reward

None of these cards are strong enough for our deck. Sanctity needs Scry we do not have. Foreign Influence is inconsistent. Tranquility is redundant with our existing exits (Vigilance, Fear No Evil, Tranquility+). Keep deck thin at 11 cards.
Done with rewards, moving to map
Rest site. At 62% HP (45/72), healing is the safe play. Upcoming path has fights and potentially an elite.
Healing 21 HP (45->66) at 62% HP. Upcoming path has fights. The HP buffer lets us take more fights safely and build our deck. Eruption upgrade is tempting but survival comes first.
Healed, moving to map to choose next path

At 91% HP with Block Potion, taking the elite for a relic. Our deck has good stance-dance tools: Eruption, Fear No Evil, Tranquility+, Vigilance, Wallop. We can handle elite fights. Path leads to Rest afterward.

events.label: Elite Decision
events.reasoning: At 91% HP with Block Potion, taking the elite for a relic. Our deck has good stance-dance tools: Eruption, Fear No Evil, Tranquility+, Vigilance, Wallop. We can handle elite fights. Path leads to Rest afterward.
Taking elite at 91% HP with Block Potion. Elite relic will strengthen our run significantly. Path leads to rest/treasure afterward if we need recovery.
Wallop on Sentry 1 deals 9 damage and gains 9 block. Defend adds 5 more block. Total 14 block vs 9 incoming from Sentry 1. Other sentries are dazing (not attacking). Safe and efficient turn.

events.command: play Like Water+; play Vigilance; end
events.reasoning: Like Water+ (power) + Vigilance (8 block, enter Calm) = 8 block now + 7 block end of turn from Like Water in Calm = 15 block vs 18 incoming. Take only 3 damage. Like Water+ provides sustained block for the rest of the fight.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Tranquility+; play Defend; end
events.translated: Eruption → Sentry → Tranquility+ → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Eruption on Sentry 1 for 9 damage (31->22 HP). Tranquility+ exits Wrath to Calm (0E, exhaust). Defend (5 block) + Like Water (7 block) = 12 vs 9 incoming. Take 0 damage. Sentries 0 and 2 daze again.

events.command: play Wallop 1; play Fear No Evil 0; end
events.translated: Wallop → Sentry → Fear No Evil → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wallop on Sentry 1 (9 damage, 22->13 HP, +9 block). Fear No Evil on Sentry 0 (8 damage, enters Calm since it is attacking, 38->30 HP). Block: 9 + 7(Like Water in Calm) = 16 vs 18 incoming. Only 2 chip damage. Focus firing Sentry 1 to eliminate it first.
Hand flooded with 3 Dazed cards. Defend (5) + Like Water (7) = 12 block vs 9 incoming. Safe. Pray+ adds 3 Mantra. Dazed cards exhaust at end of turn (ethereal). Next turn should have better draws.
Draw 2 from draw pile to find attacks. Draw pile has 7 useful cards in 15 total (8 Dazed). About 50% chance of drawing something useful.
Vigilance (8 block, enter Calm) + Defend (5 block) + Like Water (7 block) = 20 vs 18 incoming. Full block. Dazed cards are flooding our draw but we can tank through with Like Water + block cards.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Fear No Evil 1; end
events.translated: Eruption → Sentry → Fear No Evil → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Sentry 1! Eruption deals 9 damage (13->4 HP). Fear No Evil in Wrath deals 16 damage (8*2), killing the 4 HP Sentry. Fear No Evil enters Calm since enemy was attacking. 0 damage incoming this turn. Eliminating one Sentry reduces incoming Dazed generation.
Wallop on Sentry 0 (9 damage + 9 block). Defend adds 5 block. Like Water gives 7. Total 21 block vs 18 incoming. Full block! Sentry 0 at 21 HP.
Both sentries debuffing - no damage incoming. Skip turn to let 4 Dazed cards exhaust (ethereal). Next turn should draw attacks for damage.
Wallop on Sentry 0 (9 damage + 9 block, 21->12 HP). Defend (5 block). Like Water (7 block). Total 21 vs 18 incoming. Full block!

Both sentries debuffing - no damage. Playing Eruption would enter Wrath before a double-attack turn with no guaranteed exit. Too risky. Play Defend for minor value and end turn. Dazed exhausts. Will look for attack + exit combo next turn.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Sentry → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Fear No Evil on Sentry 0 (8 damage, 12->4 HP, enters Calm). Defend (5 block) + Like Water (7 block) = 12 vs 18 incoming. Take 6 damage. Sentry 0 nearly dead, can finish next turn.
Wallop kills Sentry 0 (9 damage vs 4 HP). Now only Sentry 2 (42 HP) remains. Do not play Eruption to avoid entering Wrath before attack turn. Save energy and block cards for next turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Pray+; end
events.reasoning: Only 1 Sentry left (42 HP). No attacks in hand. Block: 10 + 7 = 17 vs 9 incoming. Safe. Pray+ adds 3 Mantra (7/10 toward Divinity). Slow grind but we are maintaining HP well.
Draw 2 cards. Free turn (enemy debuffing). Want to find attacks to deal damage.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 2; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Sentry → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn (debuff). Fear No Evil deals 8 damage (42->34 HP). Vigilance enters Calm for Like Water block. 2E + 1E = 3E. Like Water gives 7 block end of turn.
Pray+ gives 3 Mantra (8+3=11), triggering DIVINITY! Leaving Calm gives +2E. Divinity gives +3E and triple damage. Energy becomes 7E. This enables a massive burst turn to kill the last Sentry.

events.translated: Eruption → Sentry → Wallop → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: DIVINITY BURST! Eruption deals 27 damage (9*3 in Divinity), Sentry at 7 HP. Enters Wrath. Wallop deals 18 (9*2 in Wrath), Sentry DEAD! Elite fight won!
Pen Nib - every 10th attack deals double damage. Great for burst turns.
Taking Swift Potion (draw 3) for emergency card draw in tough fights
Checking card reward
Inner Peace is perfect! In Calm: draw 3 cards for setup. Not in Calm: enter Calm (Wrath exit). Solves our two biggest needs - card draw and stance flexibility. Must-take card.
Moving to map
Only path. Monster fight, then rest/monster at F8, treasure at F9.

events.command: play Like Water+; play Eruption 0; end
events.translated: Like Water+ → Eruption → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn (both enemies doing setup). Like Water+ for permanent block generation. Eruption on Spike Slime for 9 damage (32->23). Enter Wrath. Safe since 0 incoming damage.

events.command: play Wallop 1; play Tranquility+; play Defend; end
events.translated: Wallop → Cultist → Tranquility+ → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wallop in Wrath on Cultist: 18 damage + 18 block! Tranquility+ exits Wrath to Calm (0E). Defend adds 5 block. Like Water adds 7. Total ~30 block vs 12 incoming. Massive value turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: 3x Defend with Frail = 9 block + Like Water 7 = 16 block vs 17 incoming (8+9). Take only 1 chip damage. Do not play Eruption to avoid entering Wrath with 17 damage incoming.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 1; play Wallop 1; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Cultist → Wallop → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Focus fire Cultist to stop Ritual stacking. Fear No Evil (8 damage, confirms Calm since Cultist attacking) + Wallop (9 damage + 9 block) = 17 damage total. Cultist at 19 HP. Block: 9 + 7(Like Water) = 16 vs 12 incoming. Safe!

events.command: play Wallop 1; play Fear No Evil 1; end
events.translated: Wallop → Cultist → Fear No Evil → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wallop (9 damage + block) + Fear No Evil (8 damage, enters Calm) = 17 damage to Cultist (19->2 HP). Block from Wallop + Like Water should mostly cover the 15 incoming. Cultist nearly dead, kill next turn.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Eruption → Cultist → Defend → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Eruption kills Cultist (2 HP). Leave Calm (+2E), enter Wrath. 3x Defend with Frail = 9 block vs Slime 16 (8*2 in Wrath). Take 7 damage but eliminate the scaling Cultist threat. Slime alone is manageable.

events.command: play Inner Peace; play Vigilance; end
events.reasoning: MUST exit Wrath! 16*2=32 would kill us. Inner Peace exits Wrath to Calm (1E). Vigilance gives 8 block (2E). Total: 8 + 7(Like Water) = 15 vs 16 incoming. Take 1 chip damage. Slime alone from here.

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Fear No Evil 0; end
events.translated: Eruption → Spike Slime (M) → Fear No Evil → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: From Calm: Eruption (9 damage, enter Wrath, +2E). Slime at 14 HP. Fear No Evil in Wrath (8*2=16 damage). 16 > 14 = KILL! Fight over!
Speed Potion (gain 5 Dexterity this turn) for boss fight defense.
Checking card reward

Flurry of Blows is PERFECT for our stance-dance deck. 0-cost, returns from discard on every stance change. Free 4 damage (8 in Wrath) every time we switch stances. Also procs Pen Nib counter. Must-take.
Done collecting rewards. Map next.
Treasure at x=2 for free relic and more routing options (leads to F10 at x=1,2,3).
Take 24 gold

Lantern gives +1 energy on first turn of each combat. Massive for setup turns - lets us play power + attack + stance card on turn 1. Taking relic over Sapphire Key since we need to survive the run first.
Moving to map
Unknown at x=3 for possible beneficial event. At 43% HP, avoid elite. Unknown leads to Shop(x=4) at F11 which would be great for our 292 gold. Monster path is fine too.
Clicking to load shop inventory
Waiting for shop to load
Waiting for shop to load
Waiting longer for shop inventory to load
Pressing space to trigger shop screen
Trying to select first shop item
RUSHDOWN is a top-tier Watcher power! Draw 2 cards every time we enter Wrath. With our stance-dancing deck, this gives massive card advantage every turn. Must-buy at 75g.
Card removal for 75g. Will remove a Defend to thin the deck. 4 Defends is too many - 3 is sufficient with Like Water+ and Wallop providing block.
Removing a Defend to thin deck to 13 cards. 3 Defends remaining plus Vigilance, Like Water+, and Wallop for block.
Confirming Defend removal
Potion slots are full (Block, Swift, Speed). Cannot buy more potions. Remaining gold (142g) cannot afford relics. Shop done with Rushdown and card removal - great purchases.
Leaving shop to continue on map
Taking Monster at x=3. We need card rewards to strengthen the deck before Hexaghost. With Lantern (+1E turn 1) and Rushdown (draw on Wrath entry), our first turns are very powerful now.
Play Flurry of Blows first (0E) to put it in discard pile. When we change stances, it returns to hand for free additional plays. Targeting Louse 0 to trigger its Curl Up 4.
Setup Like Water+ power for sustained block generation
Eruption on Louse 0 (2HP + 4 block). 9 damage kills it. Enter Wrath. Flurry of Blows returns from discard to hand.
Flurry in Wrath = 8 damage. Curl Up 7 absorbs 7, net 1 damage to Louse 1 (11->10). Must play Flurry BEFORE Fear No Evil to get it in discard for the next stance change.
Fear No Evil in Wrath = 16 damage. Louse 1 has 3 HP + 7 block = 10 effective. 16 > 10 = KILL. Enters Calm (enemy attacking). Flurry returns from discard.

events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free Flurry (0E) on Louse 2 to trigger its Curl Up 7 on a free turn (buffing). Like Water gives 7 block in Calm end of turn. One louse left, easy cleanup next turn.
In Calm, Inner Peace draws 3 cards (2x Defend, Wallop from draw pile). This gives us Wallop to kill the last Louse. No need for Rushdown in a 1-enemy cleanup.
Wallop deals 9 damage to 7 HP Louse = KILL. +7 block from Wallop damage. Clean 2-turn fight killing 3 lice!
Checking card reward

Flying Sleeves: 4x2 damage (16 in Wrath), Retain keeps it in hand if not played. Our deck needs more attacks (only 4 attacks in 13 cards). Flying Sleeves at 1E is efficient and the Retain means no wasted draws.
Map next
Only path. Unknown at F12(x=3) leads toward F13-14-15 and boss. Hope for a beneficial event.
At 43% HP (31/72), cannot afford to gamble 3 HP for 25% relic chance. Preserving HP for upcoming fights and Hexaghost boss.
Leaving the event
Shop at F13. May find useful cards or relics. Path continues to Unknown then Rest before Hexaghost.
Loading shop inventory

Battle Hymn is a MUST-TAKE power per our priority list! Generates a free Smite (12 damage, 1E, Retain, Exhaust) at the start of each turn. Consistent damage pressure that synergizes with our Wrath stance (24 damage Smites in Wrath).
Cannot afford card removal or relics. Potion slots full. Shop done.
Leaving shop, heading to map
Unknown at F14, then Rest at F15 before Hexaghost boss. Hope for a beneficial event or easy fight.

events.translated: [Take] Obtain Golden Idol. Trigger a trap.
events.reasoning: Golden Idol gives +25% gold from all sources. Very valuable relic. Will see trap options - can choose the least painful one.
Lose 5 Max HP (72->67) is the safest trap option. Curse would pollute our thin deck. 18 damage at 31 HP would leave us at 13 HP before the boss. 5 Max HP is a permanent but manageable loss.
Leaving with Golden Idol relic. Now heading to Rest at F15 before Hexaghost boss.
Rest site before boss. All three paths lead to boss.

Pre-boss assessment: HP 31/67, need to heal. Deck (15 cards): 5 attacks (Eruption, Fear No Evil, Wallop, Flurry of Blows, Flying Sleeves), 6 skills (3x Defend, Vigilance, Tranquility+, Inner Peace), 4 powers (Like Water+, Pray+, Rushdown, Battle Hymn). Strategy vs Hexaghost: Setup powers turn 1 (Lantern gives 4E). Enter Wrath when Hexaghost attacks, burst with Smites + attacks. Block with Wallop + Defends. Use potions if needed.

events.label: Boss Prep
events.reasoning: Pre-boss assessment: HP 31/67, need to heal. Deck (15 cards): 5 attacks (Eruption, Fear No Evil, Wallop, Flurry of Blows, Flying Sleeves), 6 skills (3x Defend, Vigilance, Tranquility+, Inner Peace), 4 powers (Like Water+, Pray+, Rushdown, Battle Hymn). Strategy vs Hexaghost: Setup powers turn 1 (Lantern gives 4E). Enter Wrath when Hexaghost attacks, burst with Smites + attacks. Block with Wallop + Defends. Use potions if needed.
Healing 20 HP (31->51/67 = 76%). Cannot risk Hexaghost at 46% HP. Eruption upgrade would be nice but survival comes first.
Heading to Hexaghost boss fight
Entering Hexaghost boss fight
Selecting boss node on map

events.command: play Rushdown; play Like Water+; play Flurry of Blows 0; play Fear No Evil 0; end
events.translated: Rushdown → Like Water+ → Flurry of Blows → Hexaghost → Fear No Evil → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: FREE SETUP TURN! Hexaghost activates (0 damage). Play BOTH key powers: Rushdown (draw 2 on Wrath entry) and Like Water+ (7 block in Calm end of turn). Flurry goes to discard for stance dance returns. Fear No Evil for 8 damage. Total 12 damage to 250 HP boss. Powers established for the entire fight.
Speed Potion gives +5 Dexterity this turn, boosting all block cards by 5. Combined with Block Potion, we can fully block 30 damage AND play Battle Hymn power.
Speed Potion gives +5 Dexterity this turn, boosting all block from cards by 5.
Block Potion gives 12 block for free. Combined with Dex+5 Vigilance (13 block) and Like Water, fully blocks 30 incoming.

events.command: play Battle Hymn; play Vigilance; end
events.reasoning: Battle Hymn power: get Smite (12 damage) each turn. Vigilance: 13 block (8+5 Dex), enter Calm. Total: 12 (potion) + 13 (Vigilance) + 7 (Like Water in Calm) = 32 vs 30 incoming. Take 0 damage! All 3 powers now active for the fight.
Play Flurry first to put it in discard. When we enter Wrath via Eruption, it returns to hand for another free play. This is attack #8 toward Pen Nib.
Eruption from Calm: leave Calm (+2E), enter Wrath. Rushdown triggers (draw 2)! Flurry returns from discard! Attack #9 toward Pen Nib.
Wallop with Pen Nib active in Wrath: 9*2*2 = 36 damage + 36 block! Massive offensive AND defensive value. This blocks the 12 incoming and deals huge damage.
Flurry in Wrath = 8 damage (0E). Goes to discard for next stance change. Attack #1 toward next Pen Nib.
Smite in Wrath = 12*2 = 24 damage (1E, exhaust). Hexaghost goes from 181 to ~157. Still have 36 block vs 12 incoming.
Exit Wrath to Calm (0E, exhaust). Flurry returns from discard.
Free 4 damage (0E) in Calm. Hexaghost at 153. Goes to discard for next stance change.
End turn. 43 block vs 6 incoming. Hexaghost at 153/250. Massive burst turn! Flying Sleeves retained for next turn.
In Calm, draw 3 cards from 6-card draw pile. Should draw Eruption, Flurry, and another key card. This lets us find our Wrath entry + Flurry for the stance dance combo.
Eruption from Calm: +2E, enter Wrath, 9 damage. Rushdown triggers draw 2. Massive burst incoming!

events.command: play Smite 0; play Fear No Evil 0; end
events.translated: Smite → Hexaghost → Fear No Evil → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Smite in Wrath = 24 damage. Fear No Evil in Wrath = 16 damage, exits to Calm (boss attacking). Total 49 damage this turn (with Eruption). Hexaghost at ~104. Like Water gives 7 block in Calm vs 10 incoming. Take 3 damage.

events.command: play Flurry of Blows 0; play Wallop 0; play Smite 0; end
events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Hexaghost → Wallop → Hexaghost → Smite → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Flurry (4 damage, 0E). Wallop (9 damage + 9 block). Smite (12 damage, exhaust). Total 25 damage. Block: 9 + 7(Like Water) = 16 vs 6 incoming. Hexaghost drops to ~79/250.
Eruption from Calm with Pen Nib active! 9*2=18 damage (Pen Nib doubles). Enter Wrath. Rushdown draws. Flurry returns. BOSS KILL ATTEMPT!
Smite in Wrath = 24 damage. Boss at 37 HP. Kill attempt!
Flying Sleeves in Wrath = 4x2x2 = 16 damage (multi-hit doubled). Boss at 21 HP.
Fear No Evil in Wrath = 16 damage. Boss at 5 HP. Boss defending not attacking so Fear No Evil stays in Wrath. Close to kill!
0E, all skills. Boss at 5 HP with DEFEND_BUFF. In Wrath but no damage incoming. Kill next turn guaranteed.
HEXAGHOST KILL! Smite in Wrath = 24 damage vs 5 HP + 12 block = 17 effective. 24 > 17. BOSS DOWN! ACT 1 COMPLETE!

HEXAGHOST DOWN! Act 1 boss killed in 7 turns at 68% HP. Powers (Rushdown, Like Water+, Battle Hymn) carried the fight with massive Wrath burst damage. Pen Nib Wallop for 36 damage+block was the MVP play. Moving to Act 2 - need to be careful about our 15-card deck with 2 Burns in discard.

events.label: Boss Victory
events.reasoning: HEXAGHOST DOWN! Act 1 boss killed in 7 turns at 68% HP. Powers (Rushdown, Like Water+, Battle Hymn) carried the fight with massive Wrath burst damage. Pen Nib Wallop for 36 damage+block was the MVP play. Moving to Act 2 - need to be careful about our 15-card deck with 2 Burns in discard.
Checking boss card reward
None of these rare cards fit our stance-dance burst deck. Lesson Learned is too expensive for too little damage. Conjure Blade wastes a turn. Alpha is too slow. Keep deck thin and focused.
Moving to boss relic selection

Busted Crown: +1 Energy (4 base!) with reduced card reward choices. Our deck is already well-built for stance dancing. We want to keep it thin. Velvet Choker would cap our 7+ card turns. Cursed Key would pollute draws with curses. Busted Crown is the perfect fit.
Checking current state
Moving to Act 2 after boss relic selection
Monster at x=0 starts a path toward Shop at F4 and Rest at F6. Good for deck building early in Act 2. Full HP to fight.
Battle Hymn for permanent Smite generation. 4E remaining.
Draw 3 in Calm. Need to find Rushdown and more attacks to break through 40+ block. 3E remaining.

events.command: play Flurry of Blows 0; play Eruption 0; end
events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Spheric Guardian → Eruption → Spheric Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Flurry (4 damage, 0E) then Eruption (9 damage from Calm +2E, enter Wrath). Total 13 damage vs 40 block. Block down to 27. Enemy will defend more but we chip through over time. End in Wrath - enemy defending so safe.
